seeds.description: Hours a pull request can go without human review before PR Watchdog treats it as an SLA breach and escalates to the Inbox. Edit this value to change the threshold.

seeds.value: copilot, devin, cursor, claude, codex, chatgpt, -bot
seeds.description: Comma-separated login substrings PR Watchdog treats as AI-authored or AI-reviewed (matched case-insensitively against a GitHub login). Add workspace-specific bot account names.

Comma-separated owner/repo pairs PR Watchdog checks each run (e.g. "acme/frontend, acme/core-api"). The GitHub tool set has no "list my repos" call, so this must be set explicitly — an empty value means the bot has nothing to watch.
